CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference:
Atty. GORDON WALTERS, Esq. of Berding & Weil LLP (tel: 925-838-2090) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JEFFREY GOLDMAN, Esq. of Troutman Pepper Haamilton Sanders LLP (tel: 213-928-9800) for Specially Appearing Defendant Uponor North America, Inc.
Atty. VICTORIA GRIFFIN, Esq. of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum (tel: 415-397-9006) for Defendant Broadway Mechanical Contractors, Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT UPONOR NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Matter argued and submitted. Plaintiff's counsel advises the Court that there are currently inspections scheduled to November 5, 2024, and requests the Court to allow these inspections to take place despite the Court's intention to stay the matter. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified:

Plaintiff's request for jurisdictional discovery is granted. (See Mihlon v. Sup. Ct. (1985) 169 Cal.App.3d 703, 710.) That discovery period shall end December 17, followed by a case management conference at 9:30 a.m. on December 23. The remainder of the case is stayed until December 23. The remainder of the case is stayed until December 23. Notwithstanding the stay on the remainder of the case, the phased inspections requested by Uponor of Plaintiff's property and Plaintiff's architectural testing/inspections, currently scheduled to begin November 5, 2024, may move forward as planned.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
